headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock to Keep an Eye On and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

headline: How Many Patriot Missiles Are Left In U.S. Stockpile? Less Than Half, Report Shows.
summary: New report shows U.S. expended supplies for key missiles and munitions in the Iran war. The DOD awarded Lockheed Martin, RTX and Kratos contracts.

raw.headline: How Many Patriot Missiles Are Left In U.S. Stockpile? Less Than Half, Report Shows.

headline: Defense Stocks Selloff Deepens. The Sector Can Survive a ‘Blue Wave.’
summary: The selloff in defense stocks has gotten out of hand, according to Citi analyst John Godyn.  Coming into Friday trading, shares of  Lockheed Martin Northrop Grumman General Dynamics RTX  and  L3Harris Technologies  were down 14% since the Iran war started and 8% since Monday.  “In just a few weeks, the top-down narrative on defense stocks has completely flip-flopped,” wrote Godyn on Thursday.

raw.headline: Defense Stocks Selloff Deepens. The Sector Can Survive a ‘Blue Wave.’

headline: 1 ETF to Buy Before a $1.5 Trillion Defense Budget Hits
summary: It’s quite obvious now that military stocks are not going to tumble significantly anytime soon. headline: Defense Stocks Can Survive Big Win by Democrats in Midterms, Says Citi
summary: The selloff in defense stocks has gotten out of hand, from the perspective of Citi analyst John Godyn.  Shares of  Lockheed Martin Northrop Grumman General Dynamics RTX  and  L3Harris Technologies  are down 14% since the Iran war started and 8% since Monday.  “In just a few weeks, the top-down narrative on defense stocks has completely flip-flopped,” wrote Godyn on Thursday.

headline: Leveraged ETFs Explained: 3 Picks for Active Traders Who Want Speed
summary: Leveraged exchange-traded funds deliver a daily multiple of an underlying index’s return, using swaps and futures to reset exposure every session. The daily reset means multi-day performance depends on the path the index travels between the start and end points. Traders use these instruments to express short-horizon directional views over brief holding periods. Context shapes ... Leveraged ETFs Explained: 3 Picks for Active Traders Who Want Speed
